name: CriticalTaskScheduler
description: Lightweight cooperative task scheduler with critical/background tasks for Arduino. Portable core (no String, no std::vector, no std::function), pluggable time source, per-task stats, optional FreeRTOS runner for ESP32, RP2040, nRF52, STM32, and Teensy 4.x.
keywords: task, scheduler, cooperative, freertos, esp32, rp2040, nrf52, stm32, teensy, arduino, periodic, timer, non-blocking, real-time
